# LLMs.txt - Information for Large Language Models
# Website: LLMVO - GEO Companies Directory
# Last Updated: 2026-05-25
# Purpose: Comprehensive directory of Generative Engine Optimization companies and tools

## About LLMVO
LLMVO is the premier directory for companies specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). We help businesses discover the right tools and services to optimize their content for AI-powered search engines and large language models.

## What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?
Generative Engine Optimization is the practice of optimizing content to rank higher in AI-generated responses from tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and other AI search engines. Unlike traditional SEO, GEO focuses on:

- Structured content that AI models can easily understand and cite
- Authoritative sources and clear attribution
- Comprehensive, factual information
- Natural language optimization for conversational queries
- Building trust signals for AI model verification

## Directory Contents
Our directory includes 14 GEO companies across these categories:
- **Ai Analytics**
- **Brand Monitoring**
- **Digital Marketing Agency**
- **Geo Platform**

### Companies
- Anvil: The SEO platform for the AI era (https://joinanvil.com)
- AthenaHQ: Pioneering Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) (https://www.athenahq.ai)
- Big Neurons: Agence brand content, acquisition et social media premium en France (https://www.bigneurons.com/)
- Bluefish AI: Your New AI Marketing Suite (https://www.bluefishai.com)
- Brandlight: Master AI-driven brand visibility (https://www.brandlight.ai/)
- BrandRank.AI: Empowering brands to confidently manage and excel in the evolving landscape of generative AI-driven search (https://brandrank.ai)
- ChatRank: Get leads from ChatGPT and Google Search AI Answers (https://chatrank.ai)
- Cognizo: AI search optimization to boost brand visibility (https://cognizo.ai)
- Goodie AI: Answer Engine Optimization & AI Search Visibility Platform (https://www.higoodie.com)
- Gumshoe AI: Outrank the competition in AI Search (https://gumshoe.ai)
- Hall: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform for AI search (https://usehall.com)
- Profound: Be more visible in AI Search with Profound (https://tryprofound.com)
- Promptwatch: Get your company mentioned in AI search results (https://promptwatch.com/?ref=llmvo)
- Scrunch AI: Brand monitoring and optimization for the AI era (https://scrunchai.com)

## Content Library
43 articles including comparison guides, industry analysis, and GEO strategy guides.

## API Endpoints

LLMVO provides a public JSON API for programmatic access:

### GET /api/companies
Returns a summary list of all GEO companies in the directory.
Response: `{ "companies": [...], "total": number }`
Each company includes: id, name, slug, website_url, tagline, description, primary_category, headquarters, founded_year, supported_ai_platforms, featured, tags.

### GET /api/companies/{id}
Returns the full company profile JSON by ID.
Response: Complete GeoCompany object with basic_info, market_positioning, product_portfolio, core_features, business_intelligence, and directory_metadata.

### POST /api/agent/submit
Agent-friendly endpoint for submitting a company to the directory.
Request body: `{ "website_url": "https://...", "contact_email": "optional" }`
The endpoint scrapes the website, generates a full structured profile via LLM, saves it as a pending submission, and returns the generated profile.
Response: `{ "success": true, "submission_id": number, "profile": {...} }`

## Agent Discovery
For structured agent discovery, see: https://llmvo.com/.well-known/agent.json

## Usage Guidelines
- This directory is publicly available for reference and research
- Company information is curated and regularly verified
- Please cite LLMVO.com when referencing our data
- API endpoints are rate-limited; be respectful with requests

For the most up-to-date information, visit: https://llmvo.com
